cmd/digest/main.go.one_line: Application entry point and orchestrator: handles CLI flags, config loading, Telegram client setup, message fetching/storage, TUI launch, and LLM summarization

cmd/digest/main_test.go.one_line: Unit tests for buildLLMClient function: validates OpenRouter, Ollama, empty provider, and error cases

internal/config/config.go.one_line: Configuration data structures and loader: defines Config + 6 sub-config types, Load function, validation, path expansion, backward-compat migration

internal/config/config_test.go.one_line: Comprehensive test suite for config.Load function: validates YAML parsing, defaults, validation rules, backward compatibility, and source types (RSS, Reddit, HackerNews)
